description_long: This is a modern, military-style rifle with a long, slender barrel and a fixed synthetic stock. The upper receiver features a prominent carry handle integrated with iron sights, while the lower receiver includes a pistol grip and a trigger guard. The handguard is ribbed for grip and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, which terminates in a simple flash hider. The magazine well is present but the magazine itself is not visible, suggesting it may be detachable. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic and polymer components visible throughout the design.
description: A matte black, military-style rifle with a fixed stock, carry handle, and long ribbed handguard. The barrel is slender and ends in a flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, carry handle, and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with clear visibility of the stock, handguard, and barrel.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the handguard and barrel.
